description: This file defines a Flutter widget for the Operator Dashboard screen, displaying outage and job statistics, recent outages, and navigation actions within a mobile app.

classes.name: DashboardScreen
classes.description: A stateless widget that builds the main dashboard view for the operator, including KPIs, recent outages, and navigation buttons.

classes.name: _KpiCard
classes.description: A widget that displays a KPI metric with an icon, title, and value.

classes.name: _WideCard
classes.description: A widget for displaying a section with a header and child widget, used for 'Quick actions'.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Constructs the widget tree for the DashboardScreen, including layout, KPI cards, recent outages list, and navigation actions.

methods.name: build
methods.description: Constructs the KPI card widget in _KpiCard.
